title: chaetogastra citrina
intro: Chaetogastra citrina is a plant species that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as the spurge family. The medicinal properties of Chaetogastra citrina lie in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions due to its antibacterial and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of Chaetogastra citrina can be obtained through infusion, decoction, or tincture, which can be consumed as a tea or added to topical creams for its medicinal benefits.
